title: Marines support for 2024 documentary "Make Peace or Die: Honor the Fallen"

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

All documents pertaining to collaboration between the US Marine Corps and the production of the 2024 documentary "Make Peace or Die: Honor the Fallen," directed by Manny Marquez. According to a document released to me by the Marines through FOIA (see link below), the Marines provided support to this production. I therefore request any and all documents pertaining to Marine Corps support for "Make Peace or Die." Such documents may include but should not be not limited to: script notes; production assistance agreements; photographs; and all records of communications between employees of the Marines and members of the cast, crew, and production company of "Make Peace or Die," including memos, notes of meetings and conference calls, emails, and other forms of communication.

Here is a link to the aforementioned document:

https://app.box.com/s/t7tbqia68nc136qisb88aw4yvsoajzem

I am the Director of Research Operations at a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization called The Decoding Culture Foundation as well as the editor-in-chief and a contributor to a research magazine published by said foundation titled "Cultural Engineering Studies." These documents will be used for public education and research purposes. I therefore request a waiver of all fees that may otherwise apply. Attached is a document with organization letterhead confirming my position, as well as the organization's 501(c)(3) application and approval form.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Brett Carollo

title: Marines support for 2023- Canadian documentary TV series "How I Got Here"

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

All documents pertaining to collaboration between the US Marine Corps and the production of the Canadian TV documentary series "How I Got Here" (2023-present). According to a document released to me by the Marines through FOIA (see link below), the Marines provided support to this production. I therefore request any and all documents pertaining to Marine Corps support for "How I Got Here," including all episodes with which the Marines were involved. To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

Hillsborough County Sheriff’s Office Attn: Public Records Section

Re: Public Records Request – Body-Worn Camera and Related Footage

To Whom It May Concern:
Pursuant to Chapter 119, Florida Statutes (Florida Sunshine Law), I respectfully request access to public records relating to the arrest of:
Name: Melissa Marie Nieves Date of Birth: 03/14/1992 Booking Number: 2026-6763
Date of Incident: 02/28/2026 Location: Hillsborough County, Florida
I am requesting copies of the following records:
• All body-worn camera footage from any deputies or officers who responded to the scene and interacted with Ms. Nieves during the investigation and arrest. • Any related in-car dash camera footage from responding patrol units. • Any additional audio or video recordings associated with this incident, including transport or processing footage if applicable.
For reference, it is understood that Ms. Nieves was reportedly found in the passenger seat of a vehicle. 
She participated in field sobriety exercises but declined to submit to a breath test prior to being arrested for DUI.
This request is made for personal review and not for commercial purposes.
If there are any fees associated with fulfilling this request, please provide an itemized estimate prior to processing. I prefer to receive the requested records electronically via email or secure digital download if available. If electronic delivery is not possible, please advise on alternative media options.
Please confirm receipt of this request and advise of the anticipated timeframe for production as provided under Florida law.
Thank you for your assistance and cooperation.
Sincerely,
Craig Lalane

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Craig Lalane

title: Request to Department of Homeland Security for Multimedia Agreements for 2013

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

All DHS Multimedia Agreements signed by the Department of Homeland Security for the year 2013.

I am the Director of Research Operations at a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization called The Decoding Culture Foundation as well as the editor-in-chief and a contributor to a research magazine published by said foundation titled "Cultural Engineering Studies."
